creator: mnd999@gmail.com
text:
Mine is a side effect of trying to get an updated devel/spark building as the current one in ports is very old. Recent spark needs Maven 3.3. 

Do we have consensus that there should be a single devel/maven? If so I'm happy to cancel my ticket and help out with that effort instead. As has previously been stated that would introduce a Java 7 dependency (instead of 5 or 6) but Oracle have already EOLed Java 7 so it's not exactly bleeding edge.
